UnitAbilities.Title: Artillery Commander
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this unit's Master of Ordnance model that has not already been selected for this ability this phase. Until the end of the phase, Blast weapons equipped by friendly Astra Militarum Artillery models have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability when targeting that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aeronautica Commander
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this unit's Officer of the Fleet model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Astra Militarum Aircraft model makes a ranged attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Divination (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this unit's Astropath model.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit must join one Command Squad unit from your army (a Command Squad unit cannot have more than one Regimental Attaché unit joined to it). For the rest of the battle, every model in this unit counts as part of that Command Squad unit, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join a Regimental Attaché unit to a Command Squad in this way, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

Options: heavy bolter and close combat weapon
plasma cannon and close combat weapon

UnitAbilities.Title: Mindlock
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Tech-Priest Enginseer model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by Munitorum Servitor models in this unit by 1.

LeaderInfo.Description: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Tech-Priest Enginseer (a unit cannot have more than one Munitorum Servitors unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit's Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

UnitAbilities.Title: Harker's Hellraisers
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, if the attacking model is more than 12" away, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Payback Time
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its Payback weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the [SUSTAINED HITS 3] ability instead of the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Infos.Title: ORDERS
Infos.Text: This Officer can issue 1 Order to a Catachan Jungle Fighters unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cold Steel and Courage
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Been There, Seen it, Killed it
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if it made a Charge move this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: ORDERS
Infos.Text: This Officer can issue up to 2 Orders to Regiment units.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Support
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 1 Tauros model or 2 Astra Militarum Walker models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Deployment
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Ogryn model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport Artillery models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Pinning Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Dominus triple bombard scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mount Up!
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent's Movement phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this Transport, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Infantry unit (excluding Artillery units) that is wholly within 6" of this Transport. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this Transport.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 30 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Ogryn model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport Artillery models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Vox-caster
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target the bearer's unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if there are one or more friendly Officer models within 6": on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grenadiers
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, you can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP.

Infos.Title: GRENADIER SQUAD
Infos.Text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Krieg Combat Engineers unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mobile Command Vehicle
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, one Officer model embarked within this Transport can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield. When doing so, measure distances to and from this Transport.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Ogryn model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport Artillery models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blistering Advance
UnitAbilities.Text: Units can disembark from this Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. It cannot transport Ogryn or Artillery models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Overwhelming Short-range Firepower
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll or 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tank Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shoot Sharp and Scarper
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: The Ratling Twins
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains 2 models, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Medicae Medi-packs
UnitAbilities.Text: Whilst this unit contains one or more Medicae Servitors, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mindlock
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains a Quartermaster Revenant model, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of this unit's Medical scalpels by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Recovery Vehicle
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Defence Searchlight
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sentinel Directives
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Meteoric Descent
UnitAbilities.Text: When this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a meteoric descent. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mark the Target
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Infos.Title: SNIPER TEAMS
Infos.Text: For the purposes of embarking within Transports, each Elysian Sniper Team model counts as one Heavy Weapons Team model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rearm, Reload, Fire
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Infos.Title: ARTILLERY TEAM
Infos.Text: Designer's Note: Place three Crew tokens next to this model when it is first set up, removing one each time this model loses a wound (the Heavy Mortar Team model itself is considered to represent its final wound).

UnitAbilities.Title: Pinning Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Medusa siege cannon scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Suppression Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) hit by one or more of those attacks. Unit the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: ARTILLERY TEAM
Infos.Text: Designer's Note: Place three Crew tokens next to this model when it is first set up, removing one each time this model loses a wound (the Heavy Quad Launcher Team model itself is considered to represent its final wound).

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Deployment
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. It cannot transport Ogryn or Artillery models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Anti-armour Gunship
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a Monster or Vehicle model, re-roll a Damage roll of 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Frontis
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Summary Execution
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Infantry or Astra Militarum Mounted unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Political Overwatch
UnitAbilities.Text: While another Officer model is in the same unit as this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: ORDERS
UnitAbilities.Text: This Officer can issue 1 Order to a Regiment unit. This Officer can only issue the Duty and Honour! and Fix Bayonets! Orders.

UnitAbilities.Title: Powerlifter Charge
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Furious Barrage
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack with its storm eagle rockets that targets an enemy unit that contains five or more models, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reinforced Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Flak Battery
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can Fly, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reinforced Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battleshocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Suppression Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model's Griffon heavy mortar. Unit the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Earthshaker Rounds
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, until the end of your opponent's next turn, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reinforced Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Desert Riders
UnitAbilities.Text: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this unit's Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it. In addition, this unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Outflank
UnitAbilities.Text: When this model arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent's deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

UnitAbilities.Title: Turbo-boost
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mobile Hunter-killer
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Auspex Surveyor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rolling Fortress
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an Astra Militarum model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Arkurian Stormhammer model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tracking Target
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, its Colossus siege mortar has the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities while resolving those attacks.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Support
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 36 Astra Militarum Infantry models. Each Heavy Weapons Team model and Veteran Heavy Weapons Team model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Ogryn model takes up the space of 3 models. It cannot transport Artillery models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Earthshaker Rounds
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an Infantry unit, until the end of your opponent's next turn, that Infantry unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

UnitAbilities.Title: Subterranean Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you set up this model on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Infantry unit in Strategic Reserves. If you do, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 9" of this model and more than 8" away from all enemy units.

UnitAbilities.Title: Battlefield Control
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if it is within range of an objective marker you control, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Tank Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its Macharius twin vanquisher cannon that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Aggressor
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, it does not suffer the penalty to the Hit roll for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rugged Reliability
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Battlefield Dominance
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Armoured Defender
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Explosive Death
UnitAbilities.Text: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play – it can, after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, shoot with its inferno gun as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heavy Bombs
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll nine D6, adding 1 to each result if that unit is a Monster or Vehicle for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Inferno Bombs
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll nine D6, adding 1 to each result if that unit is not a Monster or Vehicle for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bomb Drop
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Siege Bombardment
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Targeting Coordinates
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is being affected by an Order, each time it makes an attack with its Praetor launcher, it does not suffer the penalty to the Hit roll for attacking a unit that is not visible to it.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Powerful Volley
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, Heavy weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Close-range Devastation
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its Stormblade plasma blastgun that targets a unit within half range, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-8 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sentry Programming
UnitAbilities.Text: You can target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Support Vehicle
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Astra Militarum Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. The same Vehicle model cannot be selected for both this ability and the Regimental Enginseer's Omnissiah's Blessing ability in the same turn, and each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Power Overload
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Agile Dogfighter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Gunship Barrage
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ancient Conquest
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within your opponent's deployment zone, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: A Hearty ‘Pick Me Up’
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Well-stocked Supplies
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Heroic Example
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit’s Minka Lesk model is on the battlefield, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lesk’s Heroes
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Leadership characteristic of models in this unit and you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Orders
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit’s Officer can issue 2 Orders to Regiment units.

UnitAbilities.Title: Regimental Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Get Back in the Fight
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Noble Steed
UnitAbilities.Text: (Front-line Commander only): Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", change its Toughness characteristic to 4 and change its Save characteristic to 4+. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted keyword, and add to the list of units this model can be attached to: Attilan Rough Riders, Death Riders.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dauntless Veteran
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Coordinator
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Martial Zealot
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: You 'Eard 'Em
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an Order is issued to this model’s unit, this model can issue that Order to one other friendly Platoon or Ogryn unit in the same way as an Officer.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brute Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Slabshield
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Wound characteristic to 7.

UnitAbilities.Title: Dauntless Veteran
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Coordinator
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Martial Zealot
UnitAbilities.Text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mobile Firebase
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Extra Armour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 8", change its Toughness characteristic to 8, change its Save characteristic to 2+, and it loses the Scouts 9" ability.

UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for this unit.
